title: Spicy Shattering French Kale Mille Feuille
description: A spicy and crispy French dish featuring kale, shio-cure, and a flaky mille-feuille pastry, served on a wooden board, perfect for a sick day pick me up.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a large rectangle.
In a small bowl, mix together the shio cure, salt, and black pepper.
Sprinkle the shio cure mixture evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border on either side.
Arrange the kale leaves on top of the shio cure mixture in a decorative pattern.
Drizzle the spicy mayo over the kale leaves.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
Fold the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Use a sharp knife to cut the pastry into a decorative mille-feuille pattern.
Place the mille-feuille on a wooden board and bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
